name: Eggplant Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Morinu tofu, extra firm style, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Peel the eggplants and slice them into 12 pieces, about 1/4-inch thick. Slice from top to bottom.
3. Lay the slices on a paper towel and sprinkle with salt to allow water to drain.
4. In a skillet, cook the eggplant slices with Pam until tender.
5. Roll 1-1/2 ounces of tofu in each slice.
6. Pour tomato sauce over the manicotti in a casserole dish and neatly place them on top of the sauce.
7. Top with remaining sauce (additional if desired).
8. Bake in the oven at 400°F until hot all the way through.
9. Remove manicotti from the pan and serve on a serving dish.
